creator: decke@FreeBSD.org
text:
The problem is not caused by any compiler flags but if you disable
NLS like this in make.conf: OPTIONS_UNSET=DOCS NLS

It took me some time to figure out that the cause for the problem is
that --disable-nls is not passed to configure because bsd.port.pre.mk
is included in the Makefile too late. We can see that pretty nice in
the configure flags that are passed down to libgphoto2_port:

BEFORE:
=== configuring in libgphoto2_port
(/usr/ports/graphics/libgphoto2/work/libgphoto2-2.4.14/libgphoto2_port)
configure: running /bin/sh ./configure --disable-option-checking
'--prefix=/usr/local'  '--mandir=/usr/local/man'
'--infodir=/usr/local/info/' '--build=amd64-portbld-freebsd9.1'
'build_alias=amd64-portbld-freebsd9.1' 'CC=cc' 'CFLAGS=-O2 -pipe
-fno-strict-aliasing' 'LDFLAGS=' 'CPPFLAGS=' 'CPP=cpp' 'CXX=c++'
'CXXFLAGS=-O2 -pipe -fno-strict-aliasing'
'LTDLINCL=-I/usr/local/include' 'LIBLTDL=-L/usr/local/lib -lltdl'
--cache-file=/dev/null --srcdir=.

AFTER:
=== configuring in libgphoto2_port
(/usr/ports/graphics/libgphoto2/work/libgphoto2-2.4.14/libgphoto2_port)
configure: running /bin/sh ./configure --disable-option-checking
'--prefix=/usr/local'  '--disable-nls' '--mandir=/usr/local/man'
'--infodir=/usr/local/info/' '--build=amd64-portbld-freebsd9.1'
'build_alias=amd64-portbld-freebsd9.1' 'CC=cc' 'CFLAGS=-O2 -pipe
-fno-strict-aliasing' 'LDFLAGS=' 'CPPFLAGS=' 'CPP=cpp' 'CXX=c++'
'CXXFLAGS=-O2 -pipe -fno-strict-aliasing'
'LTDLINCL=-I/usr/local/include' 'LIBLTDL=-L/usr/local/lib -lltdl'
--cache-file=/dev/null --srcdir=.



--- Makefile.orig	2013-04-03 20:38:04.134766000 +0200
+++ Makefile	2013-04-03 21:38:30.585776641 +0200
@@ -25,7 +25,9 @@

 MAN3=		libgphoto2.3 libgphoto2_port.3

-.if defined(WITHOUT_NLS)
+.include <bsd.port.pre.mk>
+
+.if empty(PORT_OPTIONS:MNLS)
 CONFIGURE_ARGS+=	--disable-nls
 PLIST_SUB+=	NLS="@comment "
 USE_ICONV=	yes
@@ -34,8 +36,6 @@
 PLIST_SUB+=	NLS=""
 .endif

-.include <bsd.port.pre.mk>
-
 .if ${OSVERSION} < 800064
 LIB_DEPENDS+=	usb-0.1.8:${PORTSDIR}/devel/libusb
 .elif ${OSVERSION} < 800069
@@ -52,7 +52,7 @@
 		 s|-g -O2||g ; \
 		 /grep -i linux/s|; fi ; then|; else false; fi ; then|' ${WRKSRC}/${file}
 .endfor
-.if !defined(WITHOUT_NLS)
+.if ${PORT_OPTIONS:MNLS}
 	@${REINPLACE_CMD} -e 's|(LDFLAGS) -o|(LDFLAGS) -lintl -o|'
${WRKSRC}/libgphoto2_port/libgphoto2_port/Makefile.in
 .endif
 	@${REINPLACE_CMD} -e '/test.*udevscriptdir/d ; s|
"$$(DESTDIR)$$(udevscriptdir)"||'
${WRKSRC}/libgphoto2_port/usb/Makefile.in
${WRKSRC}/packaging/generic/Makefile.in
